title: RxNav Drug Nomenclature
description: NLM RxNorm navigation — drug names, ingredients, NDCs, and interaction checking

tools.name: get-rxcui
tools.description: Get RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier for a drug name
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will query RxNorm API /rxcui.json?name={drug_name} for concept resolution."}

tools.name: search-drugs
tools.description: Search RxNorm for drugs by approximate name match
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will query /approximateTerm.json for fuzzy drug name matching."}

tools.name: get-interactions
tools.description: Get drug-drug interactions for a list of drugs
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will query /interaction/list.json for interaction pairs with severity."}

tools.name: get-ingredients
tools.description: Get active ingredients for a drug product

tools.name: get-ndc
tools.description: Get NDC codes for a drug product

tools.name: get-drug-classes
tools.description: Get pharmacologic and therapeutic drug classes
